case_number: criminal cases emanating from FIRs No.185

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1731 of 2025 C. P No. D – 1734 of 2025 C. P No. D – 1735 of 2025 C. P No. D – 1738 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.6801/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 01.12.2025 M/s Mehboob Ali Wassan and Manzoor Hussain Halepoto, Advocates for the Petitioners(s) in all four petitions M/s Habib-ur-Rehman Shaikh and Ateeq-ur-Rehman Shaikh, Advocate for private respondents in all four petitions Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh along with Hassan Sardar Khan, SSP, Khairpur and Mir Muhammad Shaikh, DSP (Legal), Khairpur >>>>>..<<<<< Learned AAG files statements on behalf of Respondents 2 and 4 / SSP, Khairpur and Investigating Officer of Police Station, Kumb, which are taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the Petitioners. Perusal of the statement / compliance reports filed by SSP as well as Investigating Officer, reflect that all the four criminal cases emanating from FIRs No.185, 192, 196 and 198 of 2025 registered at Police Station, Kumb, District Khairpur, after impartial investigation have finally been challaned in the Court of law having jurisdiction. On such statement, learned counsel for the petitioner, under instruction, does not press instant Constitutional Petition(s) and submits that the petitioners will approach the concerned trial Court for their appropriate relief in accordance with the law. The petitions stand disposed of in the above terms along with pending applications, if any.

On such statement, learned counsel for the petitioner, under instruction, does not press instant Constitutional Petition(s) and submits that the petitioners will approach the concerned trial Court for their appropriate relief in accordance with the law. The petitions stand disposed of in the above terms along with pending applications, if any. Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matters. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
